question: Identify the Chicago library branch that ranked in the top five for circulation and visitors, and top three for computer sessions, every year from 2019 to 2021. In 2023, how many more hold requests did that branch fill than were placed at that branch? Return the number only. Your response should be in the format [Answer].

1.fact:
import os
import io
import pandas as pd
import boto3

source = "datagov/libraries-2019-circulation-by-location/files/rows.txt"
bucket = "lakeqa-yc4103-datalake"
local_path = source if os.path.exists(source) else "/tmp/k123_data_cache/" + source

if os.path.exists(local_path):
    df = pd.read_csv(local_path, sep=",", engine="c", low_memory=False)
else:
    obj = boto3.client("s3").get_object(Bucket=bucket, Key=source)
    df = pd.read_csv(io.BytesIO(obj["Body"].read()), sep=",", engine="c", low_memory=False)
group_col = "BRANCH" if "BRANCH" in df.columns else "LOCATION"
filtered = df[df["ADDRESS"].notna()].copy()
filtered["YTD"] = pd.to_numeric(filtered["YTD"], errors="coerce")
totals = filtered.groupby(group_col, dropna=True)["YTD"].sum().sort_values(ascending=False)
answer = totals.head(5).index.astype(str).str.strip().tolist()
1.subquestion: Which branches with physical addresses were in the top 5 by YTD circulation in 2019?

10.fact:
import os
import io
import re
import pandas as pd
import boto3
from botocore import UNSIGNED
from botocore.config import Config

source = "datagov/libraries-2023-holds-filled-by-location/files/rows.txt"
bucket = "lakeqa-yc4103-datalake"
local_path = source if os.path.exists(source) else "/tmp/k123_data_cache/" + source

if os.path.exists(local_path):
    df = pd.read_csv(local_path, sep=",", engine="c", low_memory=False)
else:
    obj = boto3.client("s3", config=Config(signature_version=UNSIGNED)).get_object(Bucket=bucket, Key=source)
    df = pd.read_csv(io.BytesIO(obj["Body"].read()), sep=",", engine="c", low_memory=False)

hop_3_answer = "Sulzer Regional Library"

def norm_branch(value):
    value = str(value).upper()
    value = value.replace("LIBRARY", "")
    value = re.sub(r"[^A-Z0-9 ]", " ", value)
    return re.sub(r"\s+", " ", value).strip()

group_col = "BRANCH" if "BRANCH" in df.columns else "LOCATION"
target = norm_branch(hop_3_answer)
mask = df[group_col].map(norm_branch).eq(target)
value = pd.to_numeric(df.loc[mask, "YTD"], errors="coerce").dropna()
answer = int(value.iloc[0])
10.subquestion: How many hold requests did <hop 3 answer> fill in 2023?
